stator resistance

define stator dimensions and calculate its resistance

{% raw %} 
class stator_dim:
    def __init__(self,):
        self.Ns = 0
        self.Np = 0
        self.wl = 1
        self.pp = 1
        self.pitch = 0
        self.OD = 0
        self.id_f = 0
        self.bs0 = 0
        self.hs0 = 1
        self.hs1 = 1
        self.hs2_f = 0.5
        self.r0 = 0.1
        self.len = 1
        self.valid = 0
        self.turns = 1
    
    def validate(self,):
        """ Validate the given dimensions
        """
        valid_val = 0
        

    
    def endwinding_len(self, ):
        pass
{% endraw %}
